core.label: VHDL Fundamentals
core.description: Digital design, entities, architectures, and simulation.

topics.label: Setup & Simulation
topics.description: Install GHDL or use Vivado/Quartus. VHDL describes hardware, not software.

topics.label: Entity & Architecture
topics.description: entity defines ports (inputs/outputs), architecture defines behavior. The fundamental VHDL unit.

topics.label: Data Types & Signals
topics.description: std_logic, std_logic_vector, integer, boolean. signal vs variable.

topics.label: Combinational Logic
topics.description: Concurrent assignments, with/select, when/else. Describes gates and muxes.

topics.label: Sequential Logic (process)
topics.description: process block with sensitivity list, if/elsif/else, case. Describes flip-flops and FSMs.

topics.label: Components & Hierarchy
topics.description: component declaration, port map for instantiation. Build designs from sub-components.

topics.label: Testbenches
topics.description: Write testbenches with stimulus, assert, and report. Simulation-based verification.

topics.label: State Machines
topics.description: Mealy and Moore FSMs with enumerated types. The most common sequential design pattern.
